taxonomy: Leptochilus cordatus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Pteridaceae, commonly known as the maidenhair fern family. It belongs to the genus Leptochilus, which comprises several species of ferns. The exact classification of Leptochilus cordatus includes the kingdom Plantae, phylum Pteridophyta, class Polypodiopsida, and order Polypodiales. This classification places it within the group of vascular plants that reproduce via spores. The specific classification of Leptochilus cordatus is still being researched and refined by botanists and taxonomists.
